text.content:
Banu Haqim

The Judges

In-Clan Disciplines: Blood Sorcery, Celerity, Obfuscate

Clan Bane

Blood Addiction. When a Banu Haqim drinks the blood of another Kindred, they must roll Hunger + Blood Potency (Difficulty 2 + Bane Severity). On a failure, they gain a compulsion to continue drinking until the source is drained or they are pulled away. Each drink of Kindred vitae compounds the craving.

Compulsion

Judgment. The vampire is compelled to punish someone nearby who has transgressed against their personal moral code. They must openly reprimand, lecture, or physically punish the offender. Until the transgressor has been chastised, the vampire takes a 2-dice penalty to all rolls not related to delivering judgment.
